-- iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation definition

-- DROP TABLE iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation (
	id bigserial NOT NULL,
	"uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	allotment_run_id varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	iss_issuance_id varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	pd_bank_id varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	pd_code varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	pd_name varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	total_pds int4 NOT NULL,
	issue_size numeric(20) NOT NULL,
	obligated_amount numeric(20) NOT NULL,
	total_bid_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	competitive_bid_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	noncomp_bid_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	total_accepted_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	competitive_accepted numeric(20) NULL,
	noncomp_accepted numeric(20) NULL,
	total_allotted_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	competitive_allotted numeric(20) NULL,
	noncomp_allotted numeric(20) NULL,
	is_underbid bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	shortfall_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	underbid_insertion_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	underbid_yield numeric(10, 6) NULL,
	"version" int4 NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT iss_allotment_pd_obligation_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
	CONSTRAINT iss_allotment_pd_obligation_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_pd_obligation_issuance ON iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation USING btree (iss_issuance_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_pd_obligation_pd ON iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation USING btree (pd_bank_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_pd_obligation_run ON iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation USING btree (allotment_run_id);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_pd_obligation_unique ON iss.iss_allotment_pd_obligation USING btree (allotment_run_id, pd_bank_id) WHERE (is_deleted = 'N'::bpchar);

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_allotment_run (
	id bigserial NOT NULL,
	"uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	iss_issuance_id varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	calendar_data_ref_id varchar(36) NULL,
	announcement_detail_id varchar(36) NULL,
	run_number int4 NOT NULL,
	run_type varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	run_status varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	trigger_type varchar(30) NULL,
	triggered_by_user varchar(36) NULL,
	start_timestamp timestamp NOT NULL,
	end_timestamp timestamp NULL,
	duration_seconds int4 NULL,
	issue_size numeric(20) NOT NULL,
	cut_off_yield numeric(10, 6) NULL,
	auction_strength varchar(20) NULL,
	random_seed varchar(100) NULL,
	total_bids_count int4 NULL,
	total_bids_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	competitive_bids_count int4 NULL,
	competitive_bids_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	noncomp_bids_count int4 NULL,
	noncomp_bids_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	accepted_comp_count int4 NULL,
	accepted_comp_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	accepted_noncomp_count int4 NULL,
	accepted_noncomp_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	allotted_comp_count int4 NULL,
	allotted_comp_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	allotted_noncomp_count int4 NULL,
	allotted_noncomp_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	total_allotted_amount numeric(20) NULL,
	safeguard_enabled bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	safeguard_triggered bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	safeguard_type varchar(30) NULL,
	upper_bound_yield numeric(10, 6) NULL,
	lower_bound_yield numeric(10, 6) NULL,
	underbid_detected bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	underbid_pd_count int4 NULL DEFAULT 0,
	underbid_details text NULL,
	mas_bid_1_noncomp_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	mas_bid_2_noncomp_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	mas_bid_1_comp_amt numeric(20) NULL,
	mas_bid_1_noncomp_allot numeric(20) NULL,
	mas_bid_2_noncomp_allot numeric(20) NULL,
	mas_bid_1_comp_allot numeric(20) NULL,
	warnings text NULL,
	errors text NULL,
	validation_failures text NULL,
	phase_1_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_2_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_3_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_4_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_5_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_6_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_7_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	phase_8_completed bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	"version" int4 NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT chk_auction_strength CHECK (((auction_strength)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['STRONG'::character varying, 'NORMAL'::character varying, 'WEAK'::character varying, 'NOT_DETERMINED'::character varying])::text[]))),
	CONSTRAINT chk_run_status CHECK (((run_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['IN_PROGRESS'::character varying, 'COMPLETED'::character varying, 'FAILED'::character varying, 'CANCELLED'::character varying])::text[]))),
	CONSTRAINT chk_run_type CHECK (((run_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['INITIAL'::character varying, 'RERUN_SAFEGUARD'::character varying, 'MANUAL'::character varying])::text[]))),
	CONSTRAINT iss_allotment_run_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
	CONSTRAINT iss_allotment_run_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_allotment_run_calendar ON iss.iss_allotment_run USING btree (calendar_data_ref_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_allotment_run_issuance ON iss.iss_allotment_run USING btree (iss_issuance_id);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_allotment_run_issuance_number ON iss.iss_allotment_run USING btree (iss_issuance_id, run_number) WHERE (is_deleted = 'N'::bpchar);
CREATE INDEX idx_allotment_run_status ON iss.iss_allotment_run USING btree (run_status);
CREATE INDEX idx_allotment_run_timestamp ON iss.iss_allotment_run USING btree (start_timestamp);

	CONSTRAINT chk_bounds_valid CHECK ((lower_bound_yield < upper_bound_yield)),
